name: COMPLIANCE-URLS: operator entry whose id matches a bundled framework (e.g. nist-csf-2) overrides plugin-shipped definition with a warning
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "- id: nist-csf-2
  name: Operator Edition
  url: https://my-mirror.com/csf
  authoritative_publisher: My Mirror
  jurisdiction: US Federal
  applicable_to: [security]
  identifier_scheme: GV/ID
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: false
  document_url: https://my-mirror.com/csf
  attribution_note: x
" > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/merge-registry.sh" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" 2>out.txt && grep "Operator Edition" merged.yaml 1>&2 && grep "overriding bundled framework" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
